security.csp: default-src 'self' customprotocol: asset:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: 하루 1,440분을 문학 문장으로 읽는 오프라인 시계
bundle.longDescription: WriterClock displays an exact-time literary quotation with source-review status for every minute and works fully offline.
